---
title: "Contact"
toc: false
---

Principal Investigator:

>Ben Langmead \
>Professor, Department of Computer Science \
>Johns Hopkins University \
>3400 North Charles St \
>Baltimore, MD 21218-2682

Email: `langmea <at> cs.jhu.edu` \
Phone: 410-516-2033 \
BlueSky: [@benlangmead.bsky.social](https://bsky.app/profile/benlangmead.bsky.social) \
Mastodon: [@benlangmead@genomic.social](https://genomic.social/@benlangmead) \
YouTube: [@BenLangmead](https://www.youtube.com/BenLangmead) \
Twitter: [@BenLangmead](https://twitter.com/BenLangmead) \
Threads: `@btlangmead` \
Office: 329 Malone

Office of the CS department: 160 Malone Hall
